0.8.30;\n\nimport {AccessControlDefaultAdminRulesUpgradeable} from\n    \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/access/extensions/AccessControlDefaultAdminRulesUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport {SafeERC20, IERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\nimport {IYieldDistributor} from \"./interfaces/IYieldDistributor.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title YieldDistributor\n * @notice Gradually drips yield to sVUSD vault to prevent sandwich attacks\n * @dev Yield is distributed linearly over a configurable duration period.\n *      When new yield is added, remaining undistributed yield is combined\n *      with the new amount and the distribution period is extended.\n *      Uses AccessControlDefaultAdminRulesUpgradeable for secure admin transfers with delay.\n */\ncontract YieldDistributor is IYieldDistributor, AccessControlDefaultAdminRulesUpgradeable {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                               CONSTANTS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    bytes32 public constant DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE = keccak256(\"DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE\");\n    uint256 public constant DEFAULT_YIELD_DURATION = 7 days;\n    uint256 public constant MIN_YIELD_DURATION = 1 days;\n    uint48 public constant DEFAULT_ADMIN_DELAY = 3 days;\n    uint256 internal constant PRECISION = 1e18;\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                           ERC-7201 STORAGE\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @custom:storage-location erc7201:vetro.storage.yieldDistributor\n    struct YieldDistributorStorage {\n        IERC20 asset;\n        address vault;\n        uint256 yieldDuration;\n        uint256 periodFinish;\n        uint256 rewardRate;\n        uint256 lastUpdateTime;\n    }\n\n    bytes32 private constant YIELD_DISTRIBUTOR_STORAGE_LOCATION =\n        keccak256(abi.encode(uint256(keccak256(\"vetro.storage.yieldDistributor\")) - 1)) & ~bytes32(uint256(0xff));\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                                 ERRORS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    error CannotRescueAsset();\n    error InvalidDuration(uint256 duration, uint256 minDuration);\n    error OnlyVault();\n    error ZeroAddress();\n    error ZeroAmount();\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                                 EVENTS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    event YieldDistributed(address indexed distributor, uint256 amount, uint256 newRewardRate, uint256 periodFinish);\n    event YieldDurationUpdated(uint256 previousDuration, uint256 newDuration);\n    event YieldPulled(uint256 amount);\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                              CONSTRUCTOR\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow constructor\n    constructor() {\n        _disableInitializers();\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                            INITIALIZER\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Initialize the YieldDistributor\n    /// @dev Uses DEFAULT_ADMIN_DELAY (3 days) for admin transfer delay\n    /// @param asset_ The asset token to distribute (VUSD)\n    /// @param vault_ The vault that will receive yield\n    /// @param admin_ The initial default admin of the contract\n    function initialize(address asset_, address vault_, address admin_) external initializer {\n        if (asset_ == address(0)) revert ZeroAddress();\n        if (vault_ == address(0)) revert ZeroAddress();\n        if (admin_ == address(0)) revert ZeroAddress();\n\n        __AccessControlDefaultAdminRules_init(DEFAULT_ADMIN_DELAY, admin_);\n\n        YieldDistributorStorage storage $ = _getYieldDistributorStorage();\n        $.asset = IERC20(asset_);\n        $.vault = vault_;\n        $.yieldDuration = DEFAULT_YIELD_DURATION;\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                   EXTERNAL STATE-CHANGING FUNCTIONS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Distribute yield to be dripped to the vault\n    /// @dev Combines remaining undistributed yield with new amount and extends period.\n    ///      Only callable by addresses with DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE.\n    /// @param amount_ The amount of yield to distribute\n    function distribute(uint256 amount_) external onlyRole(DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE) {\n        if (amount_ == 0) revert ZeroAmount();\n\n        YieldDistributorStorage storage $ = _getYieldDistributorStorage();\n\n        $.asset.safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount_);\n\n        uint256 _remaining;\n        if ($.lastUpdateTime < $.periodFinish && $.rewardRate != 0 && $.lastUpdateTime != 0) {\n            _remaining = (($.periodFinish - $.lastUpdateTime) * $.rewardRate) / PRECISION;\n        }\n\n        uint256 _newTotal = _remaining + amount_;\n        $.rewardRate = (_newTotal * PRECISION) / $.yieldDuration;\n        $.lastUpdateTime = block.timestamp;\n        $.periodFinish = block.timestamp + $.yieldDuration;\n\n        emit YieldDistributed(msg.sender, amount_, $.rewardRate, $.periodFinish);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Pull accrued yield to the vault\n    /// @dev Only callable by the vault contract. Transfers all pending yield\n    ///      that has accrued since the last pull based on the linear drip rate.\n    ///      Updates lastUpdateTime to current timestamp.\n    /// @return amount_ The amount of yield transferred to the vault\n    function pullYield() external returns (uint256 amount_) {\n        YieldDistributorStorage storage $ = _getYieldDistributorStorage();\n        if (msg.sender != $.vault) revert OnlyVault();\n\n        amount_ = _pendingYield($);\n\n        if (amount_ > 0) {\n            $.lastUpdateTime = block.timestamp;\n            $.asset.safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount_);\n            emit YieldPulled(amount_);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Rescue tokens accidentally sent to this contract\n    /// @dev Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Cannot rescue the distribution asset.\n    /// @param token_ The token to rescue\n    /// @param to_ The address to send rescued tokens to\n    /// @param amount_ The amount to rescue\n    function rescueTokens(address token_, address to_, uint256 amount_) external onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) {\n        if (token_ == address(_getYieldDistributorStorage().asset)) revert CannotRescueAsset();\n        if (to_ == address(0)) revert ZeroAddress();\n\n        IERC20(token_).safeTransfer(to_, amount_);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Update the yield distribution duration\n    /// @dev Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Only affects future distributions,\n    ///      not current ongoing distribution. Must be >= MIN_YIELD_DURATION (1 day).\n    /// @param duration_ The new yield duration\n    function updateYieldDuration(uint256 duration_) external onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) {\n        if (duration_ < MIN_YIELD_DURATION) {\n            revert InvalidDuration(duration_, MIN_YIELD_DURATION);\n        }\n\n        YieldDistributorStorage storage $ = _getYieldDistributorStorage();\n        emit YieldDurationUpdated($.yieldDuration, duration_);\n        $.yieldDuration = duration_;\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                    EXTERNAL VIEW FUNCTIONS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Get the asset token being distributed\n    /// @return The asset token (IERC20)\n    function asset() external view returns (IERC20) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().asset;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get the timestamp of the last yield pull\n    /// @return The Unix timestamp when yield was last pulled\n    function lastUpdateTime() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().lastUpdateTime;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get the timestamp when current distribution period ends\n    /// @return The Unix timestamp when yield distribution ends\n    function periodFinish() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().periodFinish;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get the current reward rate (tokens per second, scaled by 1e18)\n    /// @return The reward rate used for linear yield distribution\n    function rewardRate() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().rewardRate;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get the vault address that receives yield\n    /// @return The vault address\n    function vault() external view returns (address) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().vault;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get the yield distribution duration\n    /// @dev This is the period over which new yield is linearly distributed\n    /// @return The duration in seconds for yield distribution\n    function yieldDuration() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return _getYieldDistributorStorage().yieldDuration;\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                    PUBLIC VIEW FUNCTIONS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Calculate pending yield available to pull\n    /// @dev Calculates based on time elapsed since last pull multiplied by reward rate.\n    ///      Returns 0 if no distribution is active or period has not started.\n    /// @return The amount of yield tokens available to pull\n    function pendingYield() public view returns (uint256) {\n        return _pendingYield(_getYieldDistributorStorage());\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                     INTERNAL VIEW FUNCTIONS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Calculate pending yield from storage\n    /// @param $ The storage pointer\n    /// @return The amount of yield tokens available to pull\n    function _pendingYield(YieldDistributorStorage storage $) internal view returns (uint256) {\n        if ($.lastUpdateTime == 0 || $.rewardRate == 0) return 0;\n\n        uint256 _endTime = block.timestamp < $.periodFinish ? block.timestamp : $.periodFinish;\n        if (_endTime <= $.lastUpdateTime) return 0;\n\n        return ((_endTime - $.lastUpdateTime) * $.rewardRate) / PRECISION;\n    }\n\n    /*//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////\n                      PRIVATE PURE FUNCTIONS\n    //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/\n\n    /// @notice Get the storage pointer for ERC-7201 namespaced storage\n    /// @return $ The storage pointer\n    function _getYieldDistributorStorage() private pure returns (YieldDistributorStorage storage $) {\n        bytes32 _location = YIELD_DISTRIBUTOR_STORAGE_LOCATION;\n        assembly {\n            $.slot := _location\n        }\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x0d7c495f9157533c61f007f0c21c99865e6351c8c98c35ca45e7c3f0d223310a","license":"MIT"},"src/interfaces/IYieldDistributor.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity 0.8.30;\n\nimport {IERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/interfaces/IERC20.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title IYieldDistributor\n * @notice Interface for the YieldDistributor contract\n */\ninterface IYieldDistributor {\n    /// @notice Get the asset token\n    /// @return The asset token\n    function asset() external view returns (IERC20);\n\n    /// @notice Distribute yield to the vault over the yield duration\n    /// @param amount_ The amount of yield to distribute\n    function distribute(uint256 amount_) external;\n\n    /// @notice Get the last update timestamp\n    /// @return The timestamp of last yield pull\n    function lastUpdateTime() external view returns (uint256);\n\n    /// @notice Get pending yield available to pull\n    /// @return The amount of pending yield\n    function pendingYield() external view returns (uint256);\n\n    /// @notice Get the period finish timestamp\n    /// @return The timestamp when current distribution ends\n    function periodFinish() external view returns (uint256);\n\n    /// @notice Pull accrued yield to the vault\n    /// @return amount The amount of yield pulled\n    function pullYield() external returns (uint256 amount);\n\n    /// @notice Rescue tokens accidentally sent to the contract\n    /// @param token_ The token to rescue\n    /// @param to_ The address to send the tokens to\n    /// @param amount_ The amount to rescue\n    function rescueTokens(address token_, address to_, uint256 amount_) external;\n\n    /// @notice Get the current reward rate\n    /// @return The reward rate (tokens per second, scaled by 1e18)\n    function rewardRate() external view returns (uint256);\n\n    /// @notice Update the yield duration period\n    /// @param duration_ The new yield duration in seconds\n    function updateYieldDuration(uint256 duration_) external;\n\n    /// @notice Get the vault address\n    /// @return The vault address\n    function vault() external view returns (address);\n\n    /// @notice Get the yield duration period\n    /// @return The yield duration in seconds\n    function yieldDuration() external view returns (uint256);\n}\n","keccak256":"0x308ce863be8c54fbd802f60ee1359e0f6894cba9931bb9ef2aa743411577ea19","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

When new yield is added, remaining undistributed yield is combined      with the new amount and the distribution period is extended.      Uses AccessControlDefaultAdminRulesUpgradeable for secure admin transfers with delay.

AccessControlBadConfirmation().details: The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}.

AccessControlEnforcedDefaultAdminDelay(u.details: The delay for transferring the default admin delay is enforced and the operation must wait until `schedule`. NOTE: `schedule` can be 0 indicating there's no transfer scheduled.

AccessControlEnforcedDefaultAdminRules().details: At least one of the following rules was violated: - The `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` must only be managed by itself. - The `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` must only be held by one account at the time. - Any `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` transfer must be in two delayed steps.

AccessControlInvalidDefaultAdmin(address.details: The new default admin is not a valid default admin.

SafeCastOverflowedUintDowncast(uint8,uin.details: Value doesn't fit in an uint of `bits` size.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

DefaultAdminDelayChangeCanceled().details: Emitted when a {pendingDefaultAdminDelay} is reset if its schedule didn't pass.

DefaultAdminDelayChangeScheduled(uint48,.details: Emitted when a {defaultAdminDelay} change is started, setting `newDelay` as the next delay to be applied between default admin transfer after `effectSchedule` has passed.

DefaultAdminTransferCanceled().details: Emitted when a {pendingDefaultAdmin} is reset if it was never accepted, regardless of its schedule.

DefaultAdminTransferScheduled(address,ui.details: Emitted when a {defaultAdmin} transfer is started, setting `newAdmin` as the next address to become the {defaultAdmin} by calling {acceptDefaultAdminTransfer} only after `acceptSchedule` passes.

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.details: Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this.

RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}.

RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)

acceptDefaultAdminTransfer().details: Completes a {defaultAdmin} transfer previously started with {beginDefaultAdminTransfer}. After calling the function: - `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` should be granted to the caller. - `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` should be revoked from the previous holder. - {pendingDefaultAdmin} should be reset to zero values. Requirements: - Only can be called by the {pendingDefaultAdmin}'s `newAdmin`. - The {pendingDefaultAdmin}'s `acceptSchedule` should've passed.

beginDefaultAdminTransfer(address).details: Starts a {defaultAdmin} transfer by setting a {pendingDefaultAdmin} scheduled for acceptance after the current timestamp plus a {defaultAdminDelay}. Requirements: - Only can be called by the current {defaultAdmin}. Emits a DefaultAdminRoleChangeStarted event.

cancelDefaultAdminTransfer().details: Cancels a {defaultAdmin} transfer previously started with {beginDefaultAdminTransfer}. A {pendingDefaultAdmin} not yet accepted can also be cancelled with this function. Requirements: - Only can be called by the current {defaultAdmin}. May emit a DefaultAdminTransferCanceled event.

changeDefaultAdminDelay(uint48).details: Initiates a {defaultAdminDelay} update by setting a {pendingDefaultAdminDelay} scheduled for getting into effect after the current timestamp plus a {defaultAdminDelay}. This function guarantees that any call to {beginDefaultAdminTransfer} done between the timestamp this method is called and the {pendingDefaultAdminDelay} effect schedule will use the current {defaultAdminDelay} set before calling. The {pendingDefaultAdminDelay}'s effect schedule is defined in a way that waiting until the schedule and then calling {beginDefaultAdminTransfer} with the new delay will take at least the same as another {defaultAdmin} complete transfer (including acceptance). The schedule is designed for two scenarios: - When the delay is changed for a larger one the schedule is `block.timestamp + newDelay` capped by {defaultAdminDelayIncreaseWait}. - When the delay is changed for a shorter one, the schedule is `block.timestamp + (current delay - new delay)`. A {pendingDefaultAdminDelay} that never got into effect will be canceled in favor of a new scheduled change. Requirements: - Only can be called by the current {defaultAdmin}. Emits a DefaultAdminDelayChangeScheduled event and may emit a DefaultAdminDelayChangeCanceled event.

defaultAdmin().details: Returns the address of the current `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` holder.

defaultAdminDelay().details: Returns the delay required to schedule the acceptance of a {defaultAdmin} transfer started. This delay will be added to the current timestamp when calling {beginDefaultAdminTransfer} to set the acceptance schedule. NOTE: If a delay change has been scheduled, it will take effect as soon as the schedule passes, making this function returns the new delay. See {changeDefaultAdminDelay}.

defaultAdminDelayIncreaseWait().details: Maximum time in seconds for an increase to {defaultAdminDelay} (that is scheduled using {changeDefaultAdminDelay}) to take effect. Default to 5 days. When the {defaultAdminDelay} is scheduled to be increased, it goes into effect after the new delay has passed with the purpose of giving enough time for reverting any accidental change (i.e. using milliseconds instead of seconds) that may lock the contract. However, to avoid excessive schedules, the wait is capped by this function and it can be overridden for a custom {defaultAdminDelay} increase scheduling. IMPORTANT: Make sure to add a reasonable amount of time while overriding this value, otherwise, there's a risk of setting a high new delay that goes into effect almost immediately without the possibility of human intervention in the case of an input error (eg. set milliseconds instead of seconds).

distribute(uint256).details: Combines remaining undistributed yield with new amount and extends period.      Only callable by addresses with DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE.

params.amount_: The amount of yield to distribute

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

initialize(address,address,address).details: Uses DEFAULT_ADMIN_DELAY (3 days) for admin transfer delay

params.admin_: The initial default admin of the contract
params.vault_: The vault that will receive yield

returns._0: The Unix timestamp when yield was last pulled

owner().details: Gets the address of the owner.

pendingDefaultAdmin().details: Returns a tuple of a `newAdmin` and an accept schedule. After the `schedule` passes, the `newAdmin` will be able to accept the {defaultAdmin} role by calling {acceptDefaultAdminTransfer}, completing the role transfer. A zero value only in `acceptSchedule` indicates no pending admin transfer. NOTE: A zero address `newAdmin` means that {defaultAdmin} is being renounced.

pendingDefaultAdminDelay().details: Returns a tuple of `newDelay` and an effect schedule. After the `schedule` passes, the `newDelay` will get into effect immediately for every new {defaultAdmin} transfer started with {beginDefaultAdminTransfer}. A zero value only in `effectSchedule` indicates no pending delay change. NOTE: A zero value only for `newDelay` means that the next {defaultAdminDelay} will be zero after the effect schedule.

pendingYield().details: Calculates based on time elapsed since last pull multiplied by reward rate.      Returns 0 if no distribution is active or period has not started.

returns._0: The amount of yield tokens available to pull
The Unix timestamp when yield distribution ends

pullYield().details: Only callable by the vault contract. Transfers all pending yield      that has accrued since the last pull based on the linear drip rate.      Updates lastUpdateTime to current timestamp.

returns.amount_: The amount of yield transferred to the vault

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: See {AccessControl-renounceRole}. For the `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE`, it only allows renouncing in two steps by first calling {beginDefaultAdminTransfer} to the `address(0)`, so it's required that the {pendingDefaultAdmin} schedule has also passed when calling this function. After its execution, it will not be possible to call `onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE)` functions. NOTE: Renouncing `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` will leave the contract without a {defaultAdmin}, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available for it, and the possibility of reassigning a non-administrated role.

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Cannot rescue the distribution asset.

params.to_: The address to send rescued tokens to

returns._0: The reward rate used for linear yield distribution

rollbackDefaultAdminDelay().details: Cancels a scheduled {defaultAdminDelay} change. Requirements: - Only can be called by the current {defaultAdmin}. May emit a DefaultAdminDelayChangeCanceled event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

updateYieldDuration(uint256).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Only affects future distributions,      not current ongoing distribution. Must be >= MIN_YIELD_DURATION (1 day).

yieldDuration().details: This is the period over which new yield is linearly distributed

returns._0: The duration in seconds for yield distribution
